name: kind-words
title: Kind Words
description: Random compliments and gratitude prompts to lift the mood.
author: tim_gailey

commands.name: random-compliment
commands.title: Random Compliment
commands.description: Browse compliments with one preselected at random; filter by tone.

commands.name: gratitude-note
commands.title: Gratitude Note
commands.description: Browse gratitude prompts with usage notes and opener examples.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
